src/yaml_expander.rs:58-61, 140-141

Coverage: 0% for these methods

Uncovered lines: 59-60, 140-141

```rust
impl Default for YamlExpander { fn default() -> Self }
pub fn list_names(&self) -> Vec<&String>
```

Trivial methods but untested. Add tests that verify Default::default() creates an empty expander, and list_names returns the correct set of include names after adding builtins.
Add tests for YamlExpander::list_names and Default impl
